metadata.title: Image Easy — Five AI image models, one focused interface
metadata.description: Image Easy brings five production-grade AI image models into one focused workspace. No tokens, no dashboards, no clutter.
metadata.ogDescription: Five production-grade AI image models in one focused workspace.

home.lead: Image Easy brings {models} into one focused interface. {noNoise} Describe what you want and let the models handle the rest.
home.leadNoNoise: No tokens, no dashboards, no clutter.
home.section1Body: Text-to-image, image editing, product visuals, and complex scenes — focused on what is actually {em}.
home.section2Body: Choose a model, write your prompt, click {em}. Results are saved automatically to your image history.
home.section3Body: Ten free generations are waiting. No credit card, no account upgrades, no surprise bills.
home.footerCopyright: Copyright © 2026 Image Easy Inc. All rights reserved.

auth.loginLead: Sign in to start generating images. Ten free generations are waiting for you.

create.lead: Choose a model, write a prompt, adjust parameters, and generate your image.
create.promptPlaceholderI2I: How should the references be transformed?
create.promptPlaceholderT2I: Describe your subject in plain language…
create.errorRequiresImage: This model requires at least one reference image.
create.uploaderCount: {count} / {max} · jpg, png, webp · up to 20 MB
create.uploaderHint: {max} max · jpg, png, webp · up to 20 MB

descriptions.gpt-image-2-text-to-image: OpenAI's latest GPT-Image-2 — industry-leading text rendering and photorealism.
descriptions.gpt-image-2-image-to-image: Use GPT-Image-2 to re-render, restyle, or change the scene of a reference image.
descriptions.seedream-4-5-text-to-image: ByteDance Seedream 4.5 — supports 4K high-fidelity, complex scenes.
descriptions.seedream-4-5-edit: Seedream 4.5 image-to-image — preserves subject identity for precise retouching.
descriptions.nano-banana-pro: Google Gemini 3.0 Pro Image — multi-object consistency, 4K rendering.

archive.emptyText: Your image history is empty. Generate your first image when you are ready.
archive.emptyFilter: No images for this model yet.
archive.printCount: {count, plural, =0 {No images yet} one {# image} other {# images}}
archive.discardConfirm: Delete this image from your history?
